text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I pass by an arcade while<n>on my
way back from shopping...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Noooo! I lost agaaaain!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
A dance game! But I didn't manage<n>to beat the
top score!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Grrrr! I can't let it end here! I'm not<n>gonna stop
till I get it!
choice_data_list:
How about doing an easy song so you don't
miss as much?

You can get a higher score with a super hard
song!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Oh, that sounds perfect! And easy as<n>cake!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo lowers the difficulty and<n>tries again.
However...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Uuurgh...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
This is too slow for me. It's throwing<n>me off, and
I'm missing a bunch of<n>the notes!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Grrr, whyyyy?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems Twin Turbo is the type<n>whose true
potential is only released<n>when faced with a real
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huh? One-footed?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: That sounds cool! All right, I'll give it a<n>try!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Dancing like this is super hard!<n>I'm
getting all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I cleared it with only one foot!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaha! This is so fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Delighted at clearing the song with<n>one foot, Twin
Turbo seems to forget<n>all about beating the top
score.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: A super hard song?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I explain how she can build up a<n>bigger score
because there are more<n>notes in difficult songs.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huh? So what should I do?
choice_data_list: Just try to step on as many notes as you can!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Oh, I get it now! Yeah, that'll be a<n>piece of pie!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm gonna try it on Super<n>Miracle Hard
Mode!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo blazes with determination<n>as she
tries the super difficult song,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaaah! The notes are coming too<n>fast! I'm
gonna split in twooo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: But I'm getting all fired up! ENERGY<n>BOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! I can kinda follow the notes<n>now! I'll
get it this time!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Twin Turbo isn't able to get the top<n>score, but
she does hit a new<n>personal record.
